items.title: This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Has Surged 733% Over the Past 21 Months -- Is a Split on the Horizon?
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Palantir's stock has surged 733% since the launch of its Artificial Intelligence Platform in April 2023, leading to speculation about a potential stock split to make shares more accessible to smaller investors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Palantir's impressive stock performance, driven by the launch of its Artificial Intelligence Platform, and suggests the company may consider a stock split to make its shares more accessible to smaller investors.
The article mentions that Tesla, along with other megacap technology stocks, have completed stock splits in recent years, which is seen as a positive indicator for Palantir's potential split.
The article includes Nvidia as one of the megacap technology stocks that have completed stock splits, suggesting a similar move could benefit Palantir.
The article mentions Apple as another megacap technology stock that has completed a stock split, indicating this as a potential path for Palantir.
The article includes Amazon as one of the megacap technology stocks that have completed stock splits, which could serve as a model for Palantir.
The article lists Alphabet (Google) as a megacap technology stock that has completed a stock split, suggesting this as a potential strategy for Palantir.

items.title: Every Stock Warren Buffett Has Said He'd Own Practically Forever
items.author: Keith Speights
items.description: Warren Buffett has revealed the stocks he plans to hold indefinitely, including Coca-Cola, American Express, Occidental Petroleum, and several Japanese trading companies. He also considers Apple a 'forever' stock, despite recent portfolio changes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Buffett has praised Coca-Cola as a 'truly wonderful business' that he expects to 'maintain indefinitely'.
Buffett has lauded American Express as a 'truly wonderful business' that he plans to own indefinitely.
Buffett has aggressively bought Occidental Petroleum shares, citing the company's vast oil and gas holdings and leadership in carbon-capture initiatives.
Buffett has aggressively bought Occidental Petroleum shares, citing the company's vast oil and gas holdings and leadership in carbon-capture initiatives.
Buffett considers Apple an 'even better business' than Coca-Cola and plans to keep it in Berkshire's portfolio 'unless something really extraordinary happens'.

items.title: 1 Unstoppable Stock That Could Join Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft in the $3 Trillion Club in 2025
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Alphabet (Google) is poised to join the $3 trillion club in 2025 due to its advancements in artificial intelligence, particularly its Gemini AI models and AI-powered Google Search features. The company's cloud business and chip design capabilities also contribute to its growth potential.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that Alphabet has a clear path to joining the $3 trillion club in 2025 due to its advancements in artificial intelligence, particularly its Gemini AI models and AI-powered Google Search features. The company's cloud business and chip design capabilities are also expected to contribute to its growth.

Apple is mentioned as one of the companies that receives payments from Alphabet in exchange for making Google the default search engine on its devices, but the article does not provide any specific sentiment or outlook for the company.
